mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_posting JP JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_region R ON JP.fk_region_code = R.region_code JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON JP.fk_category_id = JC.category_id LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro CI ON C.fk_memberid = CI.fk_memberid WHERE 1=1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT JP.job_id AS jobId, JP.fk_memberid AS memberId, JP.title AS title, JP.work_type AS workType, JP.career_type AS careerType, JP.salary AS salary, JP.view_count AS viewCount, TO_CHAR(JP.deadline_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS deadlineAt, JP.deadline_type AS deadlineType, C.company_name AS companyName, JC.category_name AS categoryName, R.region_name AS regionName, PR.region_name AS parentRegionName, EL.edu_level_name AS educationLevelName, (SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS JOIN tbl_skill S ON JPS.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS skillNames, CASE WHEN JP.deadline_type = 'always' THEN '상시채용' WHEN JP.status = '마감' THEN '마감' WHEN JP.deadline_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '마감' WHEN TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'D-Day' ELSE 'D-' || (TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) END AS dDay, CASE WHEN JP.deadline_type = 'always' THEN 'N' WHEN JP.status = '마감' THEN 'N' WHEN TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'N' WHEN (TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) <= 7 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS dDayUrgent,
CASE WHEN JP.fk_region_code = #{regionCode} THEN 5 WHEN R.fk_parent_region_code = #{regionCode} THEN 5 WHEN R.fk_parent_region_code = ( SELECT fk_parent_region_code FROM tbl_region WHERE region_code = #{regionCode} ) THEN 3 ELSE 0 END AS regionScore,
0 AS regionScore,
CASE WHEN JP.fk_category_id = #{categoryId} THEN 3 ELSE 0 END AS categoryScore,
0 AS categoryScore,
CASE WHEN JP.salary IS NOT NULL AND JP.salary >= #{desiredSalary} * 0.8 AND JP.salary <= #{desiredSalary} * 1.5 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS salaryScore,
0 AS salaryScore,
(SELECT COUNT(*) * 2 FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT JOIN tbl_job_posting_skill JPS ON RT.fk_skill_id = JPS.fk_skill_id WHERE RT.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} AND JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS techScore, (SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT JOIN tbl_job_posting_skill JPS ON RT.fk_skill_id = JPS.fk_skill_id JOIN tbl_skill S ON RT.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE RT.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} AND JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS matchedSkills
0 AS techScore, NULL AS matchedSkills
FROM tbl_job_posting JP JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_region R ON JP.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_region PR ON R.fk_parent_region_code = PR.region_code JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON JP.fk_category_id = JC.category_id LEFT JOIN tbl_education_level EL ON JP.fk_edu_code = EL.edu_level_code WHERE JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ORDER BY (
CASE WHEN JP.fk_region_code = #{regionCode} THEN 5 WHEN R.fk_parent_region_code = #{regionCode} THEN 5 WHEN R.fk_parent_region_code = ( SELECT fk_parent_region_code FROM tbl_region WHERE region_code = #{regionCode} ) THEN 3 ELSE 0 END
0 +
CASE WHEN JP.fk_category_id = #{categoryId} THEN 3 ELSE 0 END
0 +
CASE WHEN JP.salary IS NOT NULL AND JP.salary >= #{desiredSalary} * 0.8 AND JP.salary <= #{desiredSalary} * 1.5 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END
0 +
(SELECT COUNT(*) * 2 FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT JOIN tbl_job_posting_skill JPS ON RT.fk_skill_id = JPS.fk_skill_id WHERE RT.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} AND JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id)
0 ) DESC, JP.view_count DESC, JP.created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT JP.job_id AS jobId, JP.title AS title, JP.work_type AS workType, JP.career_type AS careerType, JP.salary AS salary, JP.view_count AS viewCount, TO_CHAR(JP.deadline_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS deadlineAt, JP.deadline_type AS deadlineType, C.company_name AS companyName, JC.category_name AS categoryName, R.region_name AS regionName, PR.region_name AS parentRegionName, EL.edu_level_name AS educationLevelName, (SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS JOIN tbl_skill S ON JPS.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS skillNames, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_application JA WHERE JA.fk_job_id = JP.job_id AND JA.application_status = 0) AS applyCount, CASE WHEN JP.deadline_type = 'always' THEN '상시채용' WHEN JP.status = '마감' THEN '마감' WHEN JP.deadline_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '마감' WHEN TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'D-Day' ELSE 'D-' || (TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) END AS dDay, CASE WHEN JP.deadline_type = 'always' THEN 'N' WHEN JP.status = '마감' THEN 'N' WHEN TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'N' WHEN (TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) <= 7 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS dDayUrgent FROM tbl_job_posting JP JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_region R ON JP.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_region PR ON R.fk_parent_region_code = PR.region_code JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON JP.fk_category_id = JC.category_id LEFT JOIN tbl_education_level EL ON JP.fk_edu_code = EL.edu_level_code WHERE JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ORDER BY applyCount DESC, JP.view_count DESC, JP.created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT JP.job_id AS jobId, JP.fk_memberid AS memberId, JP.fk_category_id AS categoryId, JP.fk_region_code AS regionCode, JP.title AS title, JP.content AS content, JP.work_type AS workType, JP.career_type AS careerType, JP.fk_edu_code AS educationLevel, EL.edu_level_name AS educationLevelName, JP.salary AS salary, JP.headcount AS headcount, JP.status AS status, JP.is_hidden AS isHidden, JP.deadline_type AS deadlineType, TO_CHAR(JP.deadline_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS deadlineAt, JP.view_count AS viewCount, TO_CHAR(JP.opened_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS openedAt, TO_CHAR(JP.closed_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS closedAt, TO_CHAR(JP.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(JP.updated_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS updatedAt, C.company_name AS companyName, C.industry_code AS industryCode, C.ceo_name AS ceoName, C.biz_no AS bizNo, C.fk_memberid AS memberId, TRIM(C.addr1 || ' ' || NVL(C.addr2, '')) AS companyAddr, CI.company_type AS companyType, CI.homepage_url AS homepageUrl, TO_CHAR(CI.open_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS openDate, JC.category_name AS categoryName, R.region_name AS regionName, PR.region_name AS parentRegionName, CI.company_type AS companyType, (SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS JOIN tbl_skill S ON JPS.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS skillNames, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_scrap SC WHERE SC.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS scrapCount, (SELECT I.file_url FROM tbl_image_file I WHERE I.target_type = 'company' AND I.filecategory = 'logo' AND I.target_id = CI.company_intro_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS logoUrl FROM tbl_job_posting JP JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_region R ON JP.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_region PR ON R.fk_parent_region_code = PR.region_code JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON JP.fk_category_id = JC.category_id LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro CI ON C.fk_memberid = CI.fk_memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_education_level EL ON JP.fk_edu_code = EL.edu_level_code WHERE JP.job_id = #{jobId}
SELECT S.skill_name FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS JOIN tbl_skill S ON JPS.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JPS.fk_job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY S.skill_name
SELECT region_code AS regionCode, fk_parent_region_code AS parentRegionCode, region_name AS regionName, region_level AS regionLevel, sort FROM tbl_region ORDER BY sort ASC, region_name ASC
SELECT edu_level_code AS eduCode, edu_level_name AS eduName, sort FROM tbl_education_level ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT category_id AS categoryId, fk_parent_id AS parentId, category_name AS categoryName, depth FROM tbl_job_category ORDER BY category_id ASC

SELECT S.skill_id AS "skillId", S.skill_name AS "skillName", SC.skill_category_id AS "categoryId", SC.category_name AS "categoryName" FROM tbl_skill S JOIN tbl_skill_category SC ON S.fk_skill_category_id = SC.skill_category_id ORDER BY SC.skill_category_id ASC, S.skill_name ASC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO tbl_viewed_posting VP USING DUAL ON (VP.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND VP.fk_job_id = #{jobId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET VP.viewed_at = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (fk_job_id, fk_memberid, viewed_at) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{memberId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT JP.job_id AS jobId, JP.title AS title, JP.status AS status, JP.deadline_type AS deadlineType, TO_CHAR(JP.deadline_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS deadlineAt, C.company_name AS companyName, CASE WHEN JP.deadline_type = 'always' THEN '상시채용' WHEN JP.status = '마감' THEN '마감' WHEN JP.deadline_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '마감' WHEN TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'D-Day' ELSE 'D-' || (TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) END AS dDay FROM tbl_viewed_posting VP JOIN tbl_job_posting JP ON VP.fk_job_id = JP.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid WHERE VP.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND JP.is_hidden = 0 ORDER BY VP.viewed_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_report (report_id, target_type, target_id, fk_memberid, fk_reason_id, report_content, process_status) VALUES (seq_report_id.NEXTVAL, 1, #{jobId}, #{memberId}, #{reasonId}, #{reportContent}, '처리중')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "totalCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN M.gender = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "maleCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN M.gender = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "femaleCount", CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN M.gender = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS "malePercent", CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN M.gender = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS "femalePercent" FROM tbl_job_application JA JOIN tbl_member M ON JA.fk_memberid = M.memberid WHERE JA.fk_job_id = #{jobId} AND JA.application_status = 0

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT S.skill_name AS "name", COUNT(*) AS "count", ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS "rank" FROM tbl_job_application JA JOIN tbl_application_techstack ATS ON JA.fk_submitted_resume_id = ATS.fk_submitted_resume_id JOIN tbl_skill S ON ATS.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JA.fk_job_id = #{jobId} AND JA.application_status = 0 GROUP BY S.skill_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) WHERE "rank" <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CT.certificate_name AS "name", COUNT(*) AS "count", ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS "rank" FROM tbl_job_application JA JOIN tbl_application_certificate AC ON JA.fk_submitted_resume_id = AC.fk_submitted_resume_id JOIN tbl_certificate CT ON AC.fk_certificate_code = CT.certificate_code WHERE JA.fk_job_id = #{jobId} AND JA.application_status = 0 GROUP BY CT.certificate_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) WHERE "rank" <= 5

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, M.birth_date)/12) BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "age20", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, M.birth_date)/12) BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "age30", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, M.birth_date)/12) BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "age40", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, M.birth_date)/12) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "age50", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, M.birth_date)/12) >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "age60" FROM tbl_job_application JA JOIN tbl_member M ON JA.fk_memberid = M.memberid WHERE JA.fk_job_id = #{jobId} AND JA.application_status = 0

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.desired_salary IS NULL OR SR.desired_salary < 3000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "s1", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.desired_salary BETWEEN 3000 AND 3999 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "s2", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.desired_salary BETWEEN 4000 AND 4999 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "s3", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.desired_salary BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "s4", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.desired_salary >= 6000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "s5" FROM tbl_job_application JA JOIN tbl_submitted_resume SR ON JA.fk_submitted_resume_id = SR.submitted_resume_id WHERE JA.fk_job_id = #{jobId} AND JA.application_status = 0

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cnt = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "c0", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cnt = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "c1", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cnt = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "c2", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cnt = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "c3", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cnt >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "c4" FROM ( SELECT JA.application_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_application_certificate AC WHERE AC.fk_submitted_resume_id = JA.fk_submitted_resume_id) AS cnt FROM tbl_job_application JA WHERE JA.fk_job_id = #{jobId} AND JA.application_status = 0 )

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.fk_edu_level_code IN ('EDU_NONE', 'EDU_HIGH') OR SR.fk_edu_level_code IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "e0", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.fk_edu_level_code = 'EDU_COLLEGE_2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "e1", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.fk_edu_level_code = 'EDU_COLLEGE_4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "e2", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.fk_edu_level_code = 'EDU_MASTER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "e3", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.fk_edu_level_code = 'EDU_DOCTOR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "e4" FROM tbl_job_application JA JOIN tbl_submitted_resume SR ON JA.fk_submitted_resume_id = SR.submitted_resume_id WHERE JA.fk_job_id = #{jobId} AND JA.application_status = 0

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.total_career_months = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "cr1", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.total_career_months BETWEEN 1 AND 36 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "cr2", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.total_career_months BETWEEN 37 AND 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "cr3", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.total_career_months BETWEEN 61 AND 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "cr4", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN SR.total_career_months > 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "cr5" FROM tbl_job_application JA JOIN tbl_submitted_resume SR ON JA.fk_submitted_resume_id = SR.submitted_resume_id WHERE JA.fk_job_id = #{jobId} AND JA.application_status = 0
SELECT status FROM tbl_member WHERE memberid = #{companyMemberId}
SELECT M.status FROM tbl_member M WHERE M.memberid = #{companyMemberId}
SELECT reason_id AS reasonId, reason_name AS reasonName FROM tbl_report_reason ORDER BY reason_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_scrap SC JOIN tbl_job_posting JP ON SC.fk_job_id = JP.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON JP.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE SC.fk_memberid = #{memberId}
AND ( UPPER(JP.title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(C.company_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(JC.category_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(JP.content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS2 JOIN tbl_skill S2 ON JPS2.fk_skill_id = S2.skill_id WHERE JPS2.fk_job_id = JP.job_id AND UPPER(S2.skill_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_viewed_posting VP JOIN tbl_job_posting JP ON VP.fk_job_id = JP.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON JP.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE VP.fk_memberid = #{memberId}
AND ( UPPER(JP.title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(C.company_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(JC.category_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(JP.content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS2 JOIN tbl_skill S2 ON JPS2.fk_skill_id = S2.skill_id WHERE JPS2.fk_job_id = JP.job_id AND UPPER(S2.skill_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) )
AND VP.viewed_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{period} + 1
AND VP.viewed_at >= TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND VP.viewed_at < TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT
CASE WHEN JP.fk_region_code = #{regionCode} THEN 5 WHEN R.fk_parent_region_code = #{regionCode} THEN 5 WHEN R.fk_parent_region_code = ( SELECT fk_parent_region_code FROM tbl_region WHERE region_code = #{regionCode} ) THEN 3 ELSE 0 END AS "regionScore",
CASE WHEN JP.fk_category_id = #{categoryId} THEN 3 ELSE 0 END AS "categoryScore",
CASE WHEN JP.salary IS NOT NULL AND JP.salary >= #{desiredSalary} * 0.8 AND JP.salary <= #{desiredSalary} * 1.5 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS "salaryScore",
CASE WHEN JP.salary IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS "hasSalary",
(SELECT COUNT(*) * 2 FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT JOIN tbl_job_posting_skill JPS ON RT.fk_skill_id = JPS.fk_skill_id WHERE RT.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} AND JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS "techScore",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT JOIN tbl_job_posting_skill JPS ON RT.fk_skill_id = JPS.fk_skill_id WHERE RT.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} AND JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS "techMatchCount",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS2 WHERE JPS2.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS "techTotalCount",
(SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT JOIN tbl_job_posting_skill JPS ON RT.fk_skill_id = JPS.fk_skill_id JOIN tbl_skill S ON RT.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE RT.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} AND JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS "matchedSkills",
(SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS JOIN tbl_skill S ON JPS.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id AND JPS.fk_skill_id NOT IN ( SELECT RT2.fk_skill_id FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT2 WHERE RT2.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} )) AS "missingSkills",
R.region_name AS "postRegionName", JC.category_name AS "postCategoryName" FROM tbl_job_posting JP JOIN tbl_region R ON JP.fk_region_code = R.region_code JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON JP.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE JP.job_id = #{jobId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT JP.job_id AS jobId, JP.title AS title, JP.salary AS salary, JP.work_type AS workType, JP.career_type AS careerType, TO_CHAR(JP.deadline_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS deadlineAt, JP.deadline_type AS deadlineType, C.company_name AS companyName, JC.category_name AS categoryName, R.region_name AS regionName, PR.region_name AS parentRegionName, (SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS JOIN tbl_skill S ON JPS.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id) AS skillNames, CASE WHEN JP.deadline_type = 'always' THEN '상시채용' WHEN JP.deadline_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '마감' WHEN TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'D-Day' ELSE 'D-' || (TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) END AS dDay,
( CASE WHEN JP.fk_category_id = #{categoryId} THEN 3 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN JP.fk_region_code = #{regionCode} THEN 3 WHEN R.fk_parent_region_code = ( SELECT fk_parent_region_code FROM tbl_region WHERE region_code = #{regionCode} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + (SELECT COUNT(*) * 2 FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS1 WHERE JPS1.fk_job_id = JP.job_id AND JPS1.fk_skill_id IN ( SELECT JPS2.fk_skill_id FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS2 WHERE JPS2.fk_job_id = #{jobId} )) ) AS matchScore,
(SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS1 JOIN tbl_skill S ON JPS1.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JPS1.fk_job_id = JP.job_id AND JPS1.fk_skill_id IN ( SELECT JPS2.fk_skill_id FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS2 WHERE JPS2.fk_job_id = #{jobId} )) AS matchedSkills FROM tbl_job_posting JP JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_region R ON JP.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_region PR ON R.fk_parent_region_code = PR.region_code JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON JP.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND JP.job_id != #{jobId} AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ORDER BY ( CASE WHEN JP.fk_category_id = #{categoryId} THEN 3 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN JP.fk_region_code = #{regionCode} THEN 3 WHEN R.fk_parent_region_code = ( SELECT fk_parent_region_code FROM tbl_region WHERE region_code = #{regionCode} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + (SELECT COUNT(*) * 2 FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS1 WHERE JPS1.fk_job_id = JP.job_id AND JPS1.fk_skill_id IN ( SELECT JPS2.fk_skill_id FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS2 WHERE JPS2.fk_job_id = #{jobId} )) ) DESC, JP.view_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4
